titleStmt.title: SII 26.331: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 331. (A.R. No. 313 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Vīra Viruppaṇa-uḍaiyār: Raktākshi, Mīṉa (Paṅguṉi) śu. 6, Friday, Anusham = 1445 A.D., February 26, f.d.t. 66, f.d.n. 77.

summary.p: The inscription records a gift of the food and the upādhis due to them from the temple, as the gift of the nāḍu made by the maṉṟāḍis of the nāḍu of Iraṇḍāyiravēlippaṟṟu, to two families one headed by Kambaṉ, son of Kōbattarāyaṉ and the other headed by Periyamudali, son of Āḷappiṟandāṉ-kōṉ, who were employed to attend to the service connected with the nandā lamps and that connected with the taking out in procession the image of the deity of the temple in the same Tirukkachūr mentioned in No. 330 above. These families should render these services heriditarily. The same Vaṇḍuvarāpati, the Śamaiyakkaṇakkaṉ who figures in No. 330 above, also figures here, as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . mahāWritten below the line.maWritten below the line.ṇḍalicura śrīviraviruppaṇa Uḍaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa Irattākṣi varuṣam miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvva
pakṣattu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum ṣaṣṭiyum peṟṟa Aṉuṣattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattu
c ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluḍaiya nāyaṉārkku Iraṇḍāyiravelippaṟṟil nāṭṭu
maṉṟāṭikaḷom nāṭṭu Upaiyam Ākat tirununtāviḷakkukkum cipātam tāṅkavum cākāmuvākkuṭi Āka nāṅkaḷ viḍaḍa
kopattarāyaṉ makaṉ kampaṇaiyum Āḷappiṟantāṉ koṉ makaṉperiya mutaliyai yum Ivaruṣam
mutal cātamum nāṅkaḷ koḷḷum Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭac caṟuvamāṉiya Iṟaiyili yākat tāraivāttuk kuṭuttom Ippaṭikkuc cantirātittavaraiyum na
ṭakka kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṇṭuvarāpatic camaiyakkaṇakkaṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
